title: Hypurr Hour
summary_title: HIP3 unlocks permissionless perps, liquid staking protocols, and massive new fee verticals
summary_description: Mogi breaks down how HIP3 transforms perp listings, enables staking protocols to launch markets, and creates new revenue flows for HyperLiquid.

key_moments.label: HIP3 announcement: permissionless perp creation with major caveats
1 million HIP stake requirement and auction mechanism in HIP, not USDC
HyperLiquid Foundation remains curator of major perps, HIP3 enables niche markets
Liquid staking protocols like Kinetic become obvious beneficiaries with low cost of capital
Deployers control fees, earn 50% fee share from their perp market
HIP3 opens new vertical for decentralization and value accrual to HIP token
Twitter account compromise and monthly close above $20 despite sub-$10 dip
Pump Fun and other protocols could acquire HIP to launch permissionless perps
